context_text: All the other animals in the forest naturally expect me to be brave, for the Lion is everywhere thought to be the King of Beasts.
normalized_context_text: All the other animals in the forest naturally expect me to be brave, for the Lion is everywhere thought to be the King of Beasts.
original_context_text: All the other animals in the forest naturally expect me to be brave, for the Lion is everywhere thought to be [[the King of Beasts]].
rendered_context_text: All the other animals in the forest naturally expect me to be brave, for the Lion is everywhere thought to be the King of Beasts.
subject: the King of Beasts

context_text: I came to you to beg that you give me courage, so that in reality I may become the King of Beasts, as men call me.
